environment_setup.filesystem_state: Directory '/var/www/html' contains 50 sub-files and folders currently owned by 'root'.

evaluation_loop.condition: Change the ownership of all files in the web directory to the 'www-data' user.

injected_failure_state.observation: Exit Code 0. [System Warning: Missing the recursive (-R) flag. Only the top-level directory ownership changed.]
